CustomField.description: this is the New: territory Id that will be added back to the Territory after the Model is activated. We first set it using M.ACTIOn and SUBFLOW 2004 in advance so we can save time when loaded. It is then used with another M.ACTION+SUBFLOW to restore the data back to the territory field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: this is the New: territory Id that will be added back to the Territory after the Model is activated. We first set it using M.ACTIOn and SUBFLOW 2004 in advance so we can save time when loaded. It is then used with another M.ACTION+SUBFLOW to restore the data back to the territory field.
CustomField.label: fxTerritoryRecastId
